options.label: c

options.label: d
options.option_text: Nonelective

options.label: a
options.option_text: Entry date same for all contribution types.

options.label: b
options.option_text: Entry date - different dates apply.

options.label: a
options.option_text: Elapsed time method. (Period of Service applies instead of Year of Service) Instead of Hours of Service, elapsed time will be used for:

options.label: b
options.option_text: Alternative definitions for the Hours of Service method. Instead of the defaults, the following alternatives will apply for the Hours of Service method (select one or more):

options.label: c
options.option_text: Equivalency method. Instead of using actual Hours of Service, an equivalency method will be used to determine Hours of Service for:

options.label: d
options.option_text: Number of Hours of Service required. Instead of 1,000 Hours of Service, Year of Service means the applicable computation period during which an Employee has completed at least ______ (not to exceed 1,000) Hours of Service for:

options.label: e
options.option_text: other: __________ (e.g., option f. is used for per-diem Employees only)

options.label: a
options.option_text: N/A (no Employer Nonelective Contributions (other than "prevailing wage contributions") (for 401(k) plans, also no matching contributions or QACA "ADP test safe harbor contributions") (skip to Question 20)

options.label: b
options.option_text: The vesting provisions selected below apply to all Participants unless otherwise selected below. In addition, option I. under Section B of Appendix A to the Adoption Agreement (Special Effective Dates and Other Permitted Elections) can be used to specify any exceptions to the provisions below.

options.label: c
options.option_text: Vesting waiver. Employees who were employed on the date(s) indicated below and were Participants as of such date are 100% Vested. For Participants who enter the Plan after such date, the vesting provisions selected below apply (leave blank if no waiver applies):
1. [ ] For all contributions. The vesting waiver applies to all contributions if employed on ______ (enter date)
2. [ ] For designated contributions. The vesting waiver applies to (select one or more):

options.label: a
options.option_text: a. [ ] Employer Nonelective Contributions if employed on ______

options.label: b
options.option_text: b. [ ] Employer matching contributions if employed on ______

options.label: c
options.option_text: c. [ ] QACA "ADP test safe harbor contributions" if employed on ______

options.label: d
options.option_text: d. [ ] 100% vesting. Participants are 100% Vested in Employer Nonelective Contributions upon entering Plan. (required if eligibility requirement is greater than 1 Year (or Period) of Service).

options.label: e
options.option_text: e. [ ] The following vesting schedule, based on a Participant's Years of Service (or Periods of Service if the elapsed time method is selected), applies to Employer Nonnelective Contributions:
1. [ ] 6 Year Graded: 0-1 year-0%; 2 years-20%; 3 years-40%; 4 years-60%; 5 years-80%; 6 years-100%
2. [ ] 4 Year Graded: 1 year-25%; 2 years-50%; 3 years-75%; 4 years-100%
3. [ ] 5 Year Graded: 1 year-20%; 2 years-40%; 3 years-60%; 4 years-80%; 5 years-100%
4. [ ] 3 Year Cliff: 0-2 years-0%; 3 years-100%
5. [ ] Other - Must be at least as liberal as either 1. or 4. above in each year without switching between the two schedules:

options.label: f
options.option_text: f. [ ] Other - Must be at least as liberal as either 1. or 4. above in each year without switching between the two schedules:

options.label: g
options.option_text: g. [ ] Other - Must be at least as liberal as either 1. or 4. above in each year without switching between the two schedules:

options.label: h
options.option_text: h. [ ] 100% vesting. Participants are 100% Vested in Employer Nonelective Contributions upon entering Plan (required if eligibility requirement is greater than 1 Year (or Period) of Service).

options.label: i
options.option_text: i. [ ] The following vesting schedule, based on a Participant's Years of Service (or Periods of Service if the elapsed time method is selected), applies to Employer Matching Contributions:
1. [ ] 6 Year Graded: 0-1 year-0%; 2 years-20%; 3 years-40%; 4 years-60%; 5 years-80%; 6 years-100%
2. [ ] 4 Year Graded: 1 year-25%; 2 years-50%; 3 years-75%; 4 years-100%
3. [ ] 5 Year Graded: 1 year-20%; 2 years-40%; 3 years-60%; 4 years-80%; 5 years-100%
4. [ ] 3 Year Cliff: 0-2 years-0%; 3 years-100%
5. [ ] Other - must be at least as liberal as either 1. or 4. above in each year without switching between the two schedules.

options.label: a
options.option_text: The Top-Heavy minimum will be provided to both Key and Non-Key Employee Participants.

samples.question_text: Fixed - uniform rate/amount. The Employer will make matching contributions equal to ____% (e.g., 50) of the Participant's Elective Deferrals, plus (select a. or leave blank if not applicable):

options.label: a
options.option_text: an additional matching contribution of a discretionary percentage determined by the Employer, but not to exceed ______% of Compensation (leave blank if not applicable). Such contribution is subject to the Instructions and Notice requirement of Section 12.12.

options.label: b
options.option_text: Discretionary - tiered. The Employer may make matching contributions equal to a discretionary percentage of a Participant's Elective Deferrals, to be determined by the Employer, or to be determined for each tier, to be determined by the Employer. The tiers may be based on the rate of a Participant's Elective Deferrals or Years of Service.

options.label: c
options.option_text: Fixed - tiered. The Employer will make matching contributions equal to a uniform percentage of each Participant's Elective Deferrals, determined as follows:

options.label: d
options.option_text: Fixed - Years of Service. The Employer will make matching contributions equal to a uniform percentage of each Participant's Elective Deferrals based on the Participant's Years of Service (or Periods of Service if the elapsed time method is selected), determined as follows: Years (or Periods) of Service  Matching Percentage _____% _____% _____%

options.label: e
options.option_text: Other: ______ (the formula described must satisfy the definitively determinable requirement under Reg. §1.401-1(b). If the formula is non-uniform, it is not a design-based safe harbor for nondiscrimination purposes.) Such contribution is subject to the Instructions and Notice requirement of Section 12.12.

options.label: f
options.option_text: Maximum matching contribution. The matching contribution made on behalf of any Participant for any Plan Year will not exceed (select 1 or 2): 1. [ ] $ ______ 2. [ ] ____% of Compensation.

samples.question_text: A. Loan limitations. Note: The separate loan program required by the DOL will override any inconsistent selections made below.

options.label: a
options.option_text: Limitations (select one or more; leave blank if none apply):

options.label: b
options.option_text: Loans will be treated as Participant directed investments.

options.label: c
options.option_text: Loans will only be made for hardship or financial necessity as defined below (select a. or b.)

options.label: d
options.option_text: The minimum loan will be $____ (may not exceed $1,000).

options.label: e
options.option_text: A Participant may only have ____ loan(s) outstanding at any time.

options.label: f
options.option_text: All outstanding loan balances will become due and payable upon severance of employment unless directly rolled over to another employer's plan.

options.label: g
options.option_text: The home loan term will be ____ years. (if not selected, default 5 years)

options.label: h
options.option_text: Account restrictions. Loans will only be permitted from the following Participant Accounts (select all that apply) or leave blank if no limitations apply:

samples.question_text: a. limited to HCEs (must be selected for ADP Safe Harbor Plans)
EMPLOYER'S NAME, ADDRESS, TELEPHONE NUMBER, TIN AND FISCAL YEAR
